basic_details.job_title: HBCHRC Visakhapatnam Adhoc Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Visakhapatnam
basic_details.short_information: The Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Visakhapatnam (HBCHRC Visakhapatnam) has officially announced the Adhoc Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. TMC/HBCHRCV/AD/27/26 at https://tmc.gov.in . Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 45 years and hold qualifications such as M.Ch / D.N.B. (Head & Neck Oncology) or Surgical Oncology or M.S./D.N.B. (General Surgery / ENT) with relevant experience can now attend the walk-in process. The walk-in interview will be conducted on 12 May 2026. Direct links to downl

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Ch / D.N.B. (Head & Neck Oncology) OR M.Ch / D.N.B. in Surgical Oncology OR M.S./D.N.B. (General Surgery / ENT) OR Equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission with 3 Years' experience in Surgical / Head & Neck Oncology in a teaching Hospital after the postgraduate degree.
qualification.details: Adhoc Assistant Professor, Head & Neck Oncology: M.Ch / D.N.B. (Head & Neck Oncology) M.Ch / D.N.B. in Surgical Oncology M.S./D.N.B. (General Surgery / ENT) OR Equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission 3 Years' experience in Surgical / Head & Neck Oncology in a teaching Hospital after the postgraduate degree. Candidates with less than 3 years' experience after post-graduation will be considered for lower grade, if there are no suitably experienced candidates.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Adhoc Assistant Professor, Head & Neck Oncology

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,28,000/- Per Month to Rs.1,52,000/- Per Month
salary_details.details: Adhoc Assistant Professor, Head & Neck Oncology: Rs. 1,28,000/- Per Month to Rs.1,52,000/- Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the HBCHRC Visakhapatnam recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Adhoc Assistant Professor, specifically in Head & Neck Oncology.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Adhoc Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Adhoc Assistant Professor position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Adhoc Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess M.Ch / D.N.B. (Head & Neck Oncology) OR M.Ch / D.N.B. in Surgical Oncology OR M.S./D.N.B. (General Surgery / ENT) OR an equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by the National Medical Commission.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, 3 years of experience in Surgical / Head & Neck Oncology in a teaching hospital after the postgraduate degree is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Adhoc Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Adhoc Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 1,28,000/- to Rs. 1,52,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 12 May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their Bio-Data, recent passport size photograph, photocopies of Pan Card, original certificates, and one set of self-attested copies of all certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at the HRD Department, first floor, Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital Research Centre, Visakhapatnam.
